About.title: Trusted Partner in Global Cashew Trade
About.description1: Homie D'Lion Group is committed to providing premium Raw Cashew Nuts, Cashew Kernels, and reliable logistics solutions to customers worldwide.
About.description2: Our focus is transparency, long-term partnerships, and market intelligence that helps clients make better business decisions.

AboutPage.title: About Us
AboutPage.heading: About Homie D'Lion Group
AboutPage.paragraph1: Founded with the vision of connecting Vietnamese cashew manufacturers with trusted cashew nut suppliers in West Africa, as well as reliable cashew kernel buyers worldwide, with the goal of bringing Vietnamese cashew nuts closer to consumers. We have been and continue to work together to make this dream a reality with unwavering trust and relentless effort.
AboutPage.paragraph2: For more than 5 years, we have been immensely grateful to our valued partners and customers who have placed their trust in us and accompanied Homie D'Lion throughout its formation and development. Their support has made us stronger for the journey ahead, enabling us to create greater economic value and contribute to the development of society.

brokerage.title: Our Role
